untranslatable_reason: Signal requires mutual fund flow data and cross-sectional PRESSURE score calculation (aggregate buy/sell signals across all funds holding each stock, ranked by decile). This requires external fundamental/institutional ownership data not available in the allowed technical indicators list (price, volume, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Bollinger, Pivots, Volatility). The 5% NAV inflow threshold cannot be operationalized without access to mutual fund inflow/outflow time series and fund holdings data.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental/institutional flow-based strategy requiring: (1) mutual fund inflow/outflow data indexed by fund and quarter, (2) mutual fund holdings data by stock, (3) custom PRESSURE score computation as sum of binary Buy/Sell signals across funds, and (4) cross-sectional decile ranking by stock. Backtest engine must be extended with institutional data feeds and custom scoring logic to implement this signal. Cannot be translated to technical indicators alone.
